tmux-runtime.name: Tmux Runtime Layer
tmux-runtime.description: Use when implementing tmux-based worker processes, adding new agent types to the tmux runtime, debugging session lifecycle or output capture, tracing the pre-exit flush mechanism, or understanding the fs.watch sentinel completion pattern. Keywords: tmux, session, worker, spawn, wrapper, sentinel, staleness, fs.watch, send-keys, output capture, jq, flushPendingFiles, readdirSync, persistent, setup shim, core/tmux-types.

tmux-infrastructure.name: Tmux Abstraction Layer
tmux-infrastructure.description: Use when working on the tmux abstraction layer, wiring TmuxConnector into agent adapters (Phase 2) or WorkerPool (Phase 3), extending agent support via TmuxAgentType, or understanding the core/tmux-types.ts port boundary. Keywords: tmux, abstraction, connector, hooks, session manager, validator, sentinel, debounce, flush, agent type, jq, wrapper script, setup shim, persistent, sequence ordering, TmuxAgentType, TmuxSpawnCoreConfig, TmuxConnectorPort, core/tmux-types.
